name: Member Activity Report
query:
SELECT
  lm.name AS `Member:Link/Library Member:140`,
  lm.member_name AS `Name:Data:200`,
  lm.member_type AS `Type:Data:100`,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bi.issue_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `Issues:Int:90`,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bi.return_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `Returns:Int:90`,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bi.status = 'Overdue' AND bi.docstatus = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `Currently Overdue:Int:140`
FROM `tabLibrary Member` lm
LEFT JOIN `tabBook Issue` bi ON bi.member = lm.name AND bi.docstatus = 1
GROUP BY lm.name
ORDER BY `Issues` DESC
